config.plugin.name: pgoutput
config.transforms.router.topic.expression: if (value.channel == 'EMAIL' && value.tier == 'TRANSACTIONAL') { return 'notification.email.transactional'; } else if (value.channel == 'EMAIL' && value.tier == 'BULK') { return 'notification.email.bulk'; } else if (value.channel == 'IN_APP') { return 'notification.inapp.dispatch'; } else { return null; }
